requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — LVD, EMC and Battery Regulation Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——低压指令、电磁兼容指令及电池法规合格性
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——低壓指令、電磁相容指令及電池法規合格性

summary.en: Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) placed on the EU market must bear the CE mark, demonstrating conformity with all applicable directives and regulations — at minimum the Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU), the EMC Directive (2014/30/EU), and the EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542). The CE mark is affixed by the manufacturer or importer after completing conformity assessment (typically Module A self-declaration for LVD/EMC; specific assessment routes under Regulation 2023/1542 depend on battery category and performance class). The exact conformity assessment module requirements under Regulation 2023/1542 for stationary BESS are subject to implementing acts that had not yet been fully adopted as of mid-2026; manufacturers should monitor EUR-Lex for publication of the relevant implementing acts before finalising their conformity assessment approach.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的电池储能系统（BESS）须加贴CE标志，以证明符合所有适用指令和法规的要求——至少包括《低压指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）、《电磁兼容指令》（2014/30/EU）及欧盟《电池法规》（2023/1542）。CE标志由制造商或进口商在完成合格评定后加贴（LVD/EMC通常采用模块A自我声明；2023/1542号法规下的具体评定路径因电池类别和性能等级而异）。2023/1542号法规就固定储能BESS的精确合格评定模块要求，仍取决于截至2026年中尚未完全通过的实施法案；制造商在确定合格评定方案前，应持续关注EUR-Lex上相关实施法案的发布情况。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的電池儲能系統（BESS）須加貼CE標誌，以證明符合所有適用指令及法規的要求——至少包括《低壓指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）、《電磁相容指令》（2014/30/EU）及歐盟《電池法規》（2023/1542）。CE標誌由製造商或進口商在完成合格評定後加貼（LVD/EMC通常採用模組A自我聲明；2023/1542號法規下的具體評定路徑因電池類別及性能等級而異）。2023/1542號法規就固定儲能BESS的精確合格評定模組要求，仍取決於截至2026年中尚未完全通過的實施法案；製造商在確定合格評定方案前，應持續關注EUR-Lex上相關實施法案的發布情況。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (EU Battery Regulation) — Art. 6–10 (sustainability & safety requirements), Art. 17–20 (conformity assessment)
Decision No 768/2008/EC — Module A (internal production control)
EN IEC 62619:2022 (safety of stationary battery energy storage systems)
EN 61000-6-2 / EN 61000-6-4 (generic EMC immunity/emission for industrial environments)

summary.en: No direct equivalent. The China Compulsory Certification (CCC) scheme — administered by CNCA/CQC — covers certain electrical products for the domestic market but does not extend to stationary BESS in an equivalent scope to EU CE marking. Chinese BESS products intended for the domestic market may comply with GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131; these do not confer EU market access. CCC certification is not a substitute for CE marking under LVD, EMC, or the EU Battery Regulation.
summary.zh: 无直接等价制度。中国强制认证（CCC）由CNCA/CQC主管，覆盖部分电气产品的国内市场，但其范围不等同于欧盟CE标志对固定储能BESS的要求。面向国内市场的中国BESS产品可参照GB/T 36558及GB/T 34131，但上述标准不赋予欧盟市场准入资格。CCC认证不能替代LVD、EMC指令或欧盟《电池法规》下的CE标志。
summary.zht: 無直接等價制度。中國強制認證（CCC）由CNCA/CQC主管，涵蓋部分電氣產品的國內市場，但其範圍不等同於歐盟CE標誌對固定儲能BESS的要求。面向國內市場的中國BESS產品可參照GB/T 36558及GB/T 34131，但上述標準不賦予歐盟市場準入資格。CCC認證不能替代LVD、EMC指令或歐盟《電池法規》下的CE標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC — administered under Regulation on Compulsory Product Certification (CNCA)
GB/T 36558-2022 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)
GB/T 34131-2023 (safety requirements for battery management systems)
GB/T 17626 series (EMC, based on IEC 61000)

gap.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers must obtain CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, and EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) before EU market entry. CCC does not satisfy any of these requirements. Additional conformity documentation (technical file, EU DoC) must be compiled specifically for the EU regime. Battery Regulation conformity assessment obligations — including performance and safety thresholds — are partially subject to forthcoming implementing acts; manufacturers should monitor EUR-Lex for updates.
gap.zh: 中国BESS制造商在进入欧盟市场前，须依据LVD、EMC指令及欧盟《电池法规》（2023/1542）取得CE标志。CCC认证无法满足上述任一要求。企业还须专门为欧盟体系汇编合格评定文件（技术文件、欧盟合格声明）。《电池法规》中的性能与安全门槛部分取决于尚待颁布的实施法案，制造商应持续关注EUR-Lex的最新进展。
gap.zht: 中國BESS製造商在進入歐盟市場前，須依據LVD、EMC指令及歐盟《電池法規》（2023/1542）取得CE標誌。CCC認證無法滿足上述任一要求。企業還須專門為歐盟體系彙編合格評定文件（技術文件、歐盟合格聲明）。《電池法規》中的性能與安全門檻部分取決於尚待頒布的實施法案，製造商應持續關注EUR-Lex的最新進展。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE mark required before placing BESS on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CCC-listed product categories; stationary BESS scope differs

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, and EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) is mandatory for EU market access. CCC provides no equivalence. This is an informational summary only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距。依据LVD、EMC指令及欧盟《电池法规》（2023/1542）的CE标志是进入欧盟市场的强制性要求，CCC认证不具等效性。本摘要仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距。依據LVD、EMC指令及歐盟《電池法規》（2023/1542）的CE標誌是進入歐盟市場的強制性要求，CCC認證不具等效性。本摘要僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and Technical Documentation File
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟合格声明（DoC）与技术文件
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟合格聲明（DoC）與技術文件

summary.en: Before affixing the CE mark, the responsible economic operator (manufacturer or EU-based authorised representative) must draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and compile a technical documentation file. The DoC must identify the product, list the applicable legislation and harmonised standards applied, identify the signatory, and be kept available for 10 years after the last product is placed on the market. The technical file must include design drawings, risk assessment, test reports, and quality procedures. Under Regulation 2023/1542, additional documentation obligations apply — notably the Battery Passport, mandatory from 18 February 2027. The technical data-attribute specifications for the Battery Passport are subject to delegated acts that had not yet been published in the Official Journal as of mid-2026; manufacturers should monitor EUR-Lex and the Battery Pass consortium for updates ahead of the 2027 obligation date.
summary.zh: 在加贴CE标志之前，责任经济经营者（制造商或欧盟境内授权代表）须起草欧盟合格声明（DoC）并汇编技术文件。DoC须注明产品信息、所适用法规及使用的协调标准、签署人身份，并在最后一件产品投放市场后保存10年。技术文件须包含设计图纸、风险评估、测试报告及质量程序。依据2023/1542号法规，还须履行额外的文件义务——尤其是2027年2月18日起强制实施的电池护照。电池护照的数据属性技术规格取决于截至2026年中尚未在官方公报发布的授权法案；制造商应在2027年义务生效日前持续关注EUR-Lex及Battery Pass联盟的最新进展。
summary.zht: 在加貼CE標誌之前，責任經濟經營者（製造商或歐盟境內授權代表）須起草歐盟合格聲明（DoC）並彙編技術文件。DoC須註明產品資訊、所適用法規及使用的協調標準、簽署人身份，並在最後一件產品投放市場後保存10年。技術文件須包含設計圖紙、風險評估、測試報告及品質程序。依據2023/1542號法規，還須履行額外的文件義務——尤其是2027年2月18日起強制實施的電池護照。電池護照的數據屬性技術規格取決於截至2026年中尚未在官方公報發布的授權法案；製造商應在2027年義務生效日前持續關注EUR-Lex及Battery Pass聯盟的最新進展。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Art. 7, Annex III (DoC content), Annex IV (technical documentation)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC) — Art. 14, Annex III (DoC), Annex II (technical documentation)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 — Art. 18 (technical documentation), Art. 17 (EU declaration of conformity), Art. 77–78 (battery passport)

summary.en: Under the CCC scheme, Chinese manufacturers submit a test report and product samples to a designated certification body (e.g. CQC); a CCC certificate is issued upon approval. There is no requirement to draft a self-signed declaration of conformity or maintain a technical file in the EU sense. For export, some manufacturers voluntarily prepare a factory Declaration of Conformity for EU buyers, but this is not a Chinese regulatory obligation. No battery passport equivalent exists in Chinese regulation.
summary.zh: 在CCC体系下，中国制造商向指定认证机构（如CQC）提交测试报告和产品样品，经审核后颁发CCC证书。国内法规不要求起草自签合格声明，也不要求按欧盟标准维护技术文件。部分制造商为满足欧盟买家要求，自愿出具工厂合格声明，但这并非中国监管义务。中国法规中亦无电池护照的等效制度。
summary.zht: 在CCC體系下，中國製造商向指定認證機構（如CQC）提交測試報告及產品樣品，經審核後頒發CCC證書。國內法規不要求起草自簽合格聲明，也不要求按歐盟標準維護技術文件。部分製造商為滿足歐盟買家要求，自願出具工廠合格聲明，但這並非中國監管義務。中國法規中亦無電池護照的等效制度。

standards_or_laws: Regulations on Compulsory Product Certification (State Council Order No. 117, 2001, amended)
CNCA CCC implementation rules (product-category-specific)
GB/T 36558-2022 (supporting technical standard for BESS)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting BESS to the EU must prepare an EU-compliant DoC and technical file — neither exists as a domestic regulatory output. This requires assembling EU-specific test reports (harmonised standards), a risk assessment aligned to EU directives, and a declaration signed by an EU-recognised responsible person. The forthcoming battery passport obligation under Regulation 2023/1542 will add a further digital documentation layer with no Chinese precedent.
gap.zh: 中国BESS制造商出口欧盟时，须自行准备符合欧盟要求的DoC及技术文件——国内合规流程不产生此类输出。这要求汇集符合协调标准的欧盟专项测试报告、与欧盟指令对齐的风险评估，以及由欧盟认可的责任人签署的声明。2023/1542号法规下即将实施的电池护照义务将进一步增加数字化文件层面的要求，目前中国尚无先例。
gap.zht: 中國BESS製造商出口歐盟時，須自行準備符合歐盟要求的DoC及技術文件——國內合規流程不產生此類輸出。這要求彙集符合協調標準的歐盟專項測試報告、與歐盟指令對齊的風險評估，以及由歐盟認可的責任人簽署的聲明。2023/1542號法規下即將實施的電池護照義務將進一步增加數位化文件層面的要求，目前中國尚無先例。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DoC and technical file required before CE marking; battery passport obligation phased in under Reg 2023/1542
mandatory_status.cn: Not required in equivalent form under Chinese domestic certification

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. EU DoC and technical file must be created from scratch for BESS exports to the EU; Chinese domestic CCC documentation does not satisfy this obligation. Battery passport readiness should be monitored. Informational only — not legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距。BESS出口欧盟须从头准备欧盟合格声明及技术文件；中国国内CCC文件无法满足此义务。应持续关注电池护照的准备就绪情况。本摘要仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距。BESS出口歐盟須從頭準備歐盟合格聲明及技術文件；中國國內CCC文件無法滿足此義務。應持續關注電池護照的準備就緒情況。本摘要僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Economic Operator / Authorised Representative, WEEE and Battery Producer Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 经济经营者 / 授权代表、WEEE及电池生产者注册
requirement_topic.zht: 經濟經營者 / 授權代表、WEEE及電池生產者註冊

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 on market surveillance requires that products placed on the EU market have an identifiable responsible economic operator established in the EU — either the manufacturer (if EU-based), an importer, or a mandated authorised representative. This responsible person must be identified on the product or packaging and holds the technical file. Separately, the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EU) and Battery Regulation (2023/1542, Art. 56–61) require producers — including importers and authorised representatives acting as producers — to register with national producer registers and participate in take-back / collection schemes in each EU member state where products are sold. Stationary BESS products fall within the scope of the Battery Regulation as industrial batteries; the detailed producer registration procedures are implemented at member-state level and some procedural specifics remain subject to implementing acts still in development as of mid-2026 — verify the latest position with the relevant national competent authority in each target member state.
summary.zh: 欧盟《市场监督法规》（2019/1020）要求投放欧盟市场的产品须在欧盟境内有可识别的责任经济经营者——可以是制造商（若在欧盟境内设立）、进口商或受委托的授权代表。该责任人须在产品或包装上注明，并持有技术文件。此外，《废弃电气电子设备指令》（WEEE 2012/19/EU）及《电池法规》（2023/1542第56–61条）要求生产者——包括以生产者身份行事的进口商和授权代表——在每个销售成员国的国家生产者登记册中完成注册，并参与回收/收集计划。固定式BESS产品作为工业电池纳入《电池法规》范围；详细的生产者注册程序在成员国层面执行，部分程序细节截至2026年中仍取决于尚在制定中的实施法案——请向每个目标成员国的相关主管机构核实最新要求。
summary.zht: 歐盟《市場監督法規》（2019/1020）要求投放歐盟市場的產品須在歐盟境內有可識別的責任經濟經營者——可以是製造商（若在歐盟境內設立）、進口商或受委託的授權代表。該責任人須在產品或包裝上註明，並持有技術文件。此外，《廢棄電氣電子設備指令》（WEEE 2012/19/EU）及《電池法規》（2023/1542第56–61條）要求生產者——包括以生產者身份行事的進口商和授權代表——在每個銷售成員國的國家生產者登記冊中完成註冊，並參與回收/收集計劃。固定式BESS產品作為工業電池納入《電池法規》範圍；詳細的生產者注冊程序在成員國層面執行，部分程序細節截至2026年中仍取決於尚在制定中的實施法案——請向每個目標成員國的相關主管機構核實最新要求。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — Art. 4 (responsible economic operator), Art. 5 (tasks of authorised representative)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (Battery Regulation) — Art. 56–61 (producer responsibility, registration, take-back)
Directive 2012/19/EU (WEEE Directive) — Art. 16–17 (producer registration and reporting)

summary.en: No equivalent obligation. Chinese manufacturers are not required by domestic regulation to appoint an EU authorised representative, register with EU producer schemes, or participate in EU take-back programs. China has a domestic extended producer responsibility (EPR) framework under the Management Measures for the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2016), but this applies only within China and covers different product categories. There is no Chinese equivalent to WEEE producer registration in EU member states or to the Battery Regulation producer register.
summary.zh: 无等价义务。中国制造商在国内法规框架下无需指定欧盟授权代表、向欧盟生产者计划注册，或参与欧盟回收项目。中国依据《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（2016年）建立了国内延伸生产者责任（EPR）框架，但仅适用于中国境内且覆盖不同产品类别。中国法规中不存在欧盟成员国WEEE生产者注册或《电池法规》生产者登记册的等价制度。
summary.zht: 無等價義務。中國製造商在國內法規框架下無需指定歐盟授權代表、向歐盟生產者計劃註冊，或參與歐盟回收項目。中國依據《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（2016年）建立了國內延伸生產者責任（EPR）框架，但僅適用於中國境內且涵蓋不同產品類別。中國法規中不存在歐盟成員國WEEE生產者註冊或《電池法規》生產者登記冊的等價制度。

standards_or_laws: Management Measures for the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council, 2011, amended 2016) — domestic EPR only
No equivalent to EU Regulation 2019/1020 authorised representative requirement

gap.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers without an EU establishment must appoint an EU authorised representative (Regulation 2019/1020) before placing products on the EU market. They must also register as producers — or ensure their EU importer/representative registers — under national WEEE registers and the Battery Regulation producer register in every EU member state of sale. These obligations are fully absent from the Chinese domestic compliance framework and represent a significant market-entry structural gap.
gap.zh: 在欧盟无设立机构的中国BESS制造商在投放欧盟市场前须依据2019/1020号法规指定欧盟授权代表。同时，还须以生产者身份在每个欧盟销售成员国的国家WEEE登记册及《电池法规》生产者登记册中完成注册，或确保其欧盟进口商/代表完成注册。上述义务在中国国内合规框架中完全缺失，构成重大的市场准入结构性差距。
gap.zht: 在歐盟無設立機構的中國BESS製造商在投放歐盟市場前須依據2019/1020號法規指定歐盟授權代表。同時，還須以生產者身份在每個歐盟銷售成員國的國家WEEE登記冊及《電池法規》生產者登記冊中完成註冊，或確保其歐盟進口商/代表完成註冊。上述義務在中國國內合規框架中完全缺失，構成重大的市場準入結構性差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU authorised representative required (Reg 2019/1020); WEEE and battery producer registration required per member state
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement under Chinese domestic regulation

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. Appointment of an EU authorised representative and producer registration under WEEE and Battery Regulation are mandatory structural requirements with no Chinese domestic equivalent. Multi-country registration is required for multi-market EU sales. Informational only — not legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距。指定欧盟授权代表及依据WEEE指令和《电池法规》完成生产者注册，是强制性结构性要求，中国国内无等价制度。在多个欧盟成员国销售时须完成多国注册。本摘要仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距。指定歐盟授權代表及依據WEEE指令和《電池法規》完成生產者註冊，是強制性結構性要求，中國國內無等價制度。在多個歐盟成員國銷售時須完成多國註冊。本摘要僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
